violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Person holding state license is no longer with this location. PIC shall register as a Food Safety Manager with the State of RI. Application was provided at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023
Tray and bucket were observed in hand washing sink. Step stool was observed blocking hand sink. Items were moved and stool was relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023
